overview: ElevateX Media is a full-service digital marketing agency website inspired by WebFX. It showcases 15+ services (SEO, PPC, web design, social media, content marketing, CRO, and more), a portfolio with case studies, team info, blog, and a contact form — all branded in a professional blue palette for Mutayyab Hussain's agency in Rawalpindi.
features: Full homepage with hero, services grid, case study previews, testimonials, and CTA
15+ dedicated service pages: SEO, Local SEO, PPC, Social Media, Content Marketing, Email Marketing, Web Design, CRO, Amazon, ADA Compliance, and more
Portfolio / case studies section with filtering by category
About page with company story, values, and team stats
Contact page with validated form (collects leads)
